result:
Implementation is complete and verified. Summary of changes:

**`model/model.py`** — replaced the exp-10/12 layout-squeeze + dark-expert-gate head with a dense per-patch field-voting head:
- Deleted `layout_squeeze`, `loc_logits`, `dark_logits`, `gate`.
- Added `patch_mid` (1x1 conv 48→128), `patch_logits` (1x1 conv 128→1024), `patch_w` (1x1 conv 48→1) — a shared per-position MLP producing 64 per-patch field-logit maps, fused via a learned softmax-weighted sum.
- `forward(..., return_logits=True)` now returns `(out, logits, patch_logits)`.
- `loss_fn` gained a dense per-patch Gaussian-CE term, computed from each patch's crop-frame offset rotated by the crop's heading into map-frame, added to the unchanged fused-field CE / coord L2 / conf BCE.
- Updated module and class docstrings with an Exp 18 note.

**`model/train.py`** — `load_training_tensors` now stores each crop's heading angle as a third target component and returns `meta`; `train_area` passes `map_wh` through to the new `loss_fn` signature and logs `"head": "dense-per-patch 1x1 MLP, 64-vote fusion"` in the info dict.

Sanity checks (rotation-sign convention, forward shapes, loss finiteness, ONNX export) all passed — exported model is ~1.29 MiB, well inside the 4 MiB gate.
